title: A 2-ply seal for packaging and packaging therewith
abstract: A 2-ply seal for packaging, the 2-ply seal comprising two portions of packaging material with an inside surface of one packaging portion sealed flush to an inside surface of a second packaging portion and packaging comprising at least one 2-ply seal defining at least a portion of a perimeter seal to contain one or more items.
claims:
Claims 1. A 2-ply seal for packaging, the 2-ply seal comprising two portions of packaging material with an inside surface of one packaging portion sealed flush to an inside surface of a second packaging portion. 2. A 2-ply seal for packaging as claimed in claim 1 formed from a single ply of material folded back upon itself and at least one seal formed between overlapping portions thereof. 3. A 2-ply seal for packaging as claimed in claim 1 formed from two separate plies of material and at least one seal formed between adjacent portions of the two separate plies. 4. Packaging comprising at least one 2-ply seal defining at least a portion of a perimeter seal to contain one or more items, the 2-ply seal comprising two portions of packaging material with an inside surface of one packaging portion sealed flush to an inside surface of a second packaging portion. 5. Packaging as claimed in claim 4 comprising one ply of packaging material folded back on itself, and the 2 plies sealed to one another on three side edges with a fold on a fourth side edge. 6. Packaging as claimed in claim 5 wherein a material flare of the plies is larger on a seal side. 7. Packaging as claimed in claim 5 or claim 6 comprising an artificial side edge seal formed by sealing the fold on the fourth side edge. 8. Packaging as claimed in claim 4 wherein the 2-ply seal is formed from two separate plies of material stacked and sealed to one another. 9. Packaging as claimed in any one of claims 4 to 8 wherein the 2-ply seal is a primary, hermetic seal, sealing an inside of a first ply to an inside of a second ply or a second portion of the first ply. 10. Packaging as claimed in claim 9 comprising one or more secondary seals formed on or in the packaging by folding the packaging before the one or more secondary seals are formed. 11. Packaging as claimed in claim 10 wherein the one or more secondary seals are outside to outside seals. 12. Packaging as claimed in claim 10 or claim 11 wherein the one or more secondary seals are cosmetic or aesthetic seals to define a final package shape and/or size and/or configuration. 13. Packaging as claimed in any one of claims 9 to 12 comprising two or more adjacent chambers formed by primary seals and folded to create a pack depth, the chambers sealed/ bonded relative to each other in a secondary seal step. 14. Packaging as claimed in claims 13 wherein the chambers are different sizes to enable independent opening. 15. Packaging as claimed in any one of claims 4 to 14 wherein the ply or plies used are shaped determined by the final shape of the packaging for folding after formation of the at least one 2-ply seal. 16. Packaging as claimed in claim 15 wherein a material flare of the plies is larger on a seal side. 17. A method of forming packaging as claimed in any one of claims 4 to 7 wherein two primary lateral side edge seals are formed initially to form an open pouch into which one or more items or products are dispensed before formation of the third primary seal to close the open pouch. 18. A method of forming packaging as claimed in any one of claims 4 to 7 wherein one or more items or products are placed onto an inside surface of a ply and another portion of the ply is folded over the one or more items or products and sealed using a primary 2-ply seal on three side edges. 19. A method of forming packaging as claimed in claim 8 wherein a primary seal is formed on three side edges initially to form an open pouch into which one or more items or products are dispensed before formation of the fourth primary seal to close the open pouch. 20. A method of forming packaging as claimed in claim 19 wherein one or more items or products are placed onto an inside surface of a ply and a second ply is 

 placed over the one or more items or products and sealed using a primary 2-ply seal on four side edges. 21. A method of forming packaging as claimed in any one of claims 17 to 20 wherein a shaped forming part is used between the plies or parts of a ply to form the packaging. 22. A method of forming packaging as claimed in any one of claims 17 to 21 wherein one or more secondary side seals are formed by folding the packaging and then forming one or more secondary seals. 23. A method of forming packaging as claimed in claim 22 wherein one or more of the primary seals is folded back on itself and sealed to the outside of the pack to form a secondary seal. 24. A method of forming packaging as claimed in claim 22 or claim 23 wherein the secondary seal is formed by applying seal pressure in already flat areas of the overlapping primary seals. 25. A method of forming packaging as claimed in any one of claims 17 to 24 wherein a portion of the packaging is sealed and/or cut in a shape, to form a packaging feature such as a pouring spout.
